title: Decor for Architecture
description: A decor pack to work with the "Grand Design" architecture mod or other mods.
body:
A decor pack to work with the "Grand Design" architecture mod or any architecture mod. More items will be added in time.

UPDATE FEB 2026: Added more items!
Pot plants
Palms in pots
Paintings

Pool items
- diving board + platform and ladder
- beach ball that can be knocked about
- ducky pool ring you can float in
- outdoor furniture including chairs, table and umbrella

Original Items:

Objects to place on blocks or tables
desk items
photo frames
objects
vases
table place settings

Objects to place on walls
masks
wall mounts
swords and a shield

Objects to place on the ground
magazine rack
wine rack
rugs

Food
bowl of fruit, juice jug, pizza, Chinese takeout, sushi, burger

Also a banana peel you can slip on, so watch out!
